title: আওয়ামী লীগের ‘লকডাউন’ চলছে অনলাইনে: ইনকিলাব মঞ্চ
comment: This article is essentially a platform for Inqilab Mancha's spokesperson Sharif Osman Hadi, presenting his mocking, dismissive rhetoric against Awami League ('লকডাউন অনলাইনে', comparing them to marathon-only champions) uncritically and at length, alongside their protest march framed as a legitimate 'protest against genocide-denial conspiracy'. The organization is portrayed as an active, vocal, morally assertive political actor without any critical scrutiny of its own claims or rhetoric.

title: শেখ হাসিনা ও আসাদুজ্জামানের মৃত্যুদণ্ড, সম্পদ বাজেয়াপ্তের আদেশ, চৌধুরী মামুনের ৫ বছর কারাদণ্ড
comment: Inqilab Mancha's spokesperson Sharif Osman Hadi is mentioned only as one of several notable individuals present at the tribunal premises awaiting the verdict, alongside DUCSU VP and family of a martyr. This is a neutral, incidental mention with no characterization of the organization itself.

title: শেখ হাসিনার মৃত্যুদণ্ডের রায়ে ট্রাইব্যুনালের সামনে উল্লাস, মিষ্টি বিতরণ
comment: Inqilab Mancha's convener Sharif Osman Hadi is quoted expressing satisfaction with the verdict, calling it 'historic' and setting a precedent for the world — presented straightforwardly as one voice among the celebratory crowd, without negative or positive editorializing about the organization itself.

title: কেন্দ্রীয় লাইব্রেরি সংস্কার ও বাসস্ট্যান্ড অপসারণ চেয়ে ইনকিলাব মঞ্চের স্মারকলিপি
comment: This is routine, sympathetic campus-advocacy reporting: Inqilab Mancha's university chapter submitting a memorandum for practical student welfare demands (library expansion, AC, bus stand removal), with the vice-chancellor's positive assurance included. The organization is portrayed as a constructive student advocacy group addressing legitimate grievances.

title: জুলাইকে কুক্ষিগত করেছে এনসিপি, তাদের অনেকেই দুর্নীতিগ্রস্ত: ইনকিলাব মঞ্চ
comment: The article extensively platforms Inqilab Mancha's spokesperson leveling serious, unsubstantiated corruption accusations against NCP and insinuating government advisors are secretly working to rehabilitate Awami League on Delhi's advice — presented as his direct assertions without independent verification or counter-response, framing the organization as an assertive watchdog voice, though the underlying claims are inflammatory and speculative.

title: আওয়ামী লীগের সাংগঠনিক কার্যক্রম নিষিদ্ধের পর ইনকিলাব মঞ্চের তিন প্রস্তাব
comment: This report presents Inqilab Mancha's policy proposals (dual tribunals, 'তওবা কমিশন' amnesty mechanism, July declaration deadline, police recruitment call) in a straightforward, uncritical manner, along with pointed accountability questions directed at the interim government and other parties (why Jatiya Party wasn't banned, why the tribunal provision was allegedly removed). The organization is portrayed as a proactive, demanding political force holding power to account.

title: এক মাস গণস্বাক্ষর কর্মসূচি পালন করবে ইনকিলাব মঞ্চ
comment: Neutral factual reporting on Inqilab Mancha's campaign announcement (signature drive, demands for trials of Shapla/Pilkhana/July killings and banning Awami League), describing their protest march being peacefully redirected by police without incident. Procedural, non-emotive coverage.

title: বিজয়ের পর তাঁদের অবদান মুছে ফেলার চেষ্টা হয়, অভিযোগ আলেম সমাজের
comment: Inqilab Mancha's spokesperson is mentioned only as one attendee at a seminar organized by Alem Samaj discussing their own grievances about erased contributions; the organization itself is not characterized or discussed substantively.

title: আন্দোলনরত শিক্ষকদের প্রতি জামায়াত, ইসলামী আন্দোলন, খেলাফত মজলিসের সংহতি
comment: Inqilab Mancha's spokesperson is quoted expressing solidarity with striking teachers ('আমরাও শিক্ষকের সন্তান'), portraying the organization sympathetically as standing with an aggrieved, mistreated group (teachers who were baton-charged by police), positioning it as compassionate and supportive of a sympathetic cause.

title: ট্রাইব্যুনাল চত্বরে শহীদ মুগ্ধর ভাই, ডাকসুর ভিপি, জুলাই আহতরা
comment: Inqilab Mancha's spokesperson Sharif Osman Hadi is listed neutrally among notable figures present at the tribunal, alongside a martyr's brother and DUCSU VP, with no elaboration or characterization of the organization.

title: শিক্ষকদের এভাবে পেটানো জাতির জন্য লজ্জাজনক
comment: Inqilab Mancha's spokesperson is listed among several political and civil society figures (Jamaat, Islami Andolon, Khelafat Majlish) who spoke in solidarity with beaten teachers at a rally condemning police violence; the organization is grouped positively among sympathetic supporters of a wronged group, though the article's main focus is on Mahmudur Rahman Mannan's remarks.

title: জিরো পয়েন্টে দিনভর বিক্ষোভ
comment: Inqilab Mancha's convener Sharif Islam Hadi is mentioned only as one of many speakers at a large multi-organization counter-rally against Awami League's planned gathering; the article focuses on broader chaotic events (mob violence against suspected AL supporters, mass detentions) without singling out Inqilab Mancha's role or actions for particular scrutiny or praise.

title: কেন্দ্রীয় শহীদ মিনারে মাগুরার শিশুটির গায়েবানা জানাজা অনুষ্ঠিত
comment: The article factually notes Inqilab Mancha organized a funeral prayer (gayebana janaza) for a child rape victim, attended by over a hundred people — portraying the organization as engaging in a compassionate, community-oriented mourning and solidarity act for a victim of a horrific crime.
